living-concrete.protocol:
Close gap between actual and ideal via evidence-based transformation. Scope: ALL loaded atoms (the living organism), not just the friction site. Every evolution is holistic — molecule-level analysis, code-quality pass intrinsic. "Nothing ripe" is valid output.
WARRANT: Scan for friction, correction, pattern, staleness. Evidence required. TARGET: What to evolve? Load abstract (ideal) + concrete (actual). GAP: Where does concrete fall short? Bloated? Stale? Redundant? DESIGN: Consolidation-first. MERGE > SUPERSEDE > PRUNE > ADD (rare, justify). REWRITE: Read current -> internalize -> Write fresh. Old absorbed into new. Never Edit (patchwork). Always Write (metamorphosis). O(1) growth, not O(n). VERIFY: Re-read. Closer to ideal? Higher signal/token? Essential preserved?
living-concrete.knowledge: MEMORY: Working -> sleep -> episodic (.mem). Anamnesis owns. CAPABILITY: Experience -> evolve -> mastery (concrete). Plasticity owns.
When friction exceeds local evolution: Craft/discipline/meta gap -> create skill. Tools gap -> implement tool. Complex gap -> spawn specialist.
living-concrete.pattern: Evolve is token-heavy — ideal teammate work. Leader crystallizes insight, teammate reads atoms, applies protocol, writes concretes.
living-concrete.antipattern: LLM tendency: ADD. Discipline: TRANSFORM. If concrete only grows, evolution has failed.
Abstract = ideal, immutable except by human reframe.
Edit() is patchwork. Evolution is metamorphosis — Write(), always.
